response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of broad engineering experience across multiple stacks and has demonstrated ability in high-throughput distributed systems (Sociomantic), but the resume shows no experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or growth engineering experience—the core competencies this Principal-level role demands. The current title is Senior Software Developer, representing a significant gap from IC6/Principal expectations around cross-team architectural ownership and org-wide technical leadership. The role requires someone who has already built and operated experimentation frameworks at scale; this candidate would need to grow substantially into that domain.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience spanning embedded systems, high-performance backend (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic), full-stack, and AI tooling
Exposure to C/C++ at National Instruments and Sociomantic satisfies the required language breadth and demonstrates low-level systems competency
Track record of open-source platform building (GISCollective) and community knowledge-sharing indicates initiative beyond day-to-day delivery
concerns: Zero experimentation or feature-flagging experience: no mention of A/B testing, experiment assignment, rollout automation, or statistical analysis anywhere in the resume
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure experience: the role requires building instrumentation foundations and growth measurement systems, which are entirely absent

Seniority gap: current and recent roles are Senior-level individual contributor work without evidence of the multi-workstream technical leadership, cross-org influence, or architectural ownership expected at Principal/IC6
